description_long: This is a two-story hardware store with a flat roof, featuring a utilitarian and somewhat aged exterior. The front facade displays a large signboard with Japanese characters, flanked by two air conditioning units on the roof and one on the ground level. The ground floor has a glass storefront with visible shelving and products inside, while the upper floor is covered by a wooden lattice and corrugated metal siding. The side and rear walls are plain, with corrugated metal and concrete surfaces, and utility wires running along the exterior. A rooftop antenna and a street sign are also present, adding to the urban context.
description: A two-story, utilitarian hardware store with a glass storefront, rooftop units, and visible signage in Japanese. The exterior features corrugated metal, concrete, and utility wires, giving it an urban, slightly aged appearance.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main glass storefront, signage with Japanese text, rooftop air conditioning units, and a street sign.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the plain concrete and corrugated metal back wall, rooftop antenna, and minimal architectural features.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the unadorned back and side walls, utility wires, and rooftop details.
description_view_3: Front-right view showing the side signage, utility wires, glass storefront, and street sign near the entrance.
attribute_storefront_signage: A vertical signboard with Japanese characters in dark text on a light background, mounted on the left side of the upper facade.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features a wide glass entrance with two large windows, a vertical signboard on the left, and air conditioning units above and beside the entrance. The design is functional, with minimal decorative elements.
